overall.description: A first-person exploration sequence from Cyberpunk 2077, beginning on a rain-slicked neon-lit street at night, proceeding through an industrial alleyway, ascending metal stairs to an elevated catwalk, and descending back down. The environment features wet reflective surfaces, towering billboards, and industrial architecture.

approaching covered alley entrance on the right side of street

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rain-slicked city street at night, illuminated by streetlights and neon billboards. The camera moves forward along the wet asphalt, passing a pedestrian on the left, with an industrial building facade on the left and an elevated highway structure overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered alleyway with debris leading to industrial stairs

events.description: turning right into covered alleyway with yellow concrete flooring
approaching metal staircase at the end of the alley

agents.ego_description: turning into a narrow alleyway and approaching a stairwell entrance

steep metal staircase with yellow railings leading upward
bright yellow metal bench against the right wall
scattered cardboard and trash along the left wall

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right into a covered alleyway with yellow concrete flooring, leaving the open street behind. The space is narrower and sheltered from the rain, with debris scattered along the walls and a yellow bench visible. At the end of the alley, a metal staircase leads upward.

events.description: beginning ascent of metal staircase with yellow railings
reaching top of stairs where brighter light from upper level becomes visible

agents.ego_description: climbing industrial metal stairs with grated steps and yellow handrails

entered.detail: yellow painted metal handrails along both sides of the stairs
metal walkway structure visible at the top of the stairs

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends a steep industrial metal staircase with yellow safety railings, transitioning from the ground level alley to an upper catwalk. The environment is enclosed and dimly lit, with metal grating underfoot and industrial walls on either side.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated industrial catwalk overlooking street level

events.description: encountering NPC standing guard near door marked T19
pausing to look down over railing at street level below

agents.ego_description: walking along elevated catwalk, observing the street below and passing an NPC guard

notable_agents.action: standing guard beside door T19, facing the wall

entered.detail: rusted metal walkway with yellow guard rails overlooking the street
industrial metal door labeled T19 with keypad entry
view looking down to the street level from the elevated position
large digital billboards visible in the distance from the elevated vantage

segments.scene_description: Emerging onto an elevated metal catwalk, the camera explores the industrial walkway with yellow railings. An NPC stands guard near a door marked T19 on the right. The camera pauses to look down at the street level below, where neon billboards and street lights are visible from above.

scene_state.functional_zone: descending industrial stairwell to lower level

events.description: turning and beginning descent of metal stairs
entering darker stairwell section with red indicator lights visible below

agents.ego_description: descending metal stairs into a darker lower level of the structure

entered.detail: narrow metal staircase leading downward with grated steps
red warning lights visible at the bottom of the stairwell

segments.scene_description: The camera turns and descends a narrow metal stairwell, leaving the elevated catwalk behind. The environment becomes darker as it moves downward, with red indicator lights visible at the bottom of the stairs.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a rain-slicked neon street into the depths of an industrial complex and back down again. It begins by gliding along wet asphalt under an elevated highway, passing a pedestrian amidst the glow of towering billboards before turning right into a sheltered alleyway with yellow concrete floors. As the camera leaves the open street, it ascends a steep metal staircase with yellow safety railings, transitioning from the ground level into a dimly lit, enclosed industrial space. The scene then opens onto an elevated catwalk where the camera passes a guard near a marked door and looks down at the distant city lights below. Finally, the perspective turns and descends a narrow stairwell, moving away from the height of the catwalk and into a darker environment marked by red indicator lights.
